stages.name: query_validation
stages.summary: Structured query accepted after normalizing one duplicate path hint.

warnings.summary: Duplicate preferred path was removed during normalization.

stages.name: candidate_generation
stages.summary: Generated a broader candidate set under partial parser coverage.

warnings.summary: One target namespace only exposed structural definitions.

degradation_flags.summary: Fallback parsing was used for the retry namespace.

stages.name: ranking
stages.summary: Top candidates remain plausible, but one authority target is still ambiguous.

warnings.summary: Two payment-related candidates remain close after structural ranking.

degradation_flags.summary: Lexical signals were needed to retain one exploratory retry unit.

stages.name: context_packet_assembly
stages.summary: Assembled a bounded packet with exploratory units and explicit degradations.

stages.name: raw_code_fetch
stages.summary: Fetched enclosing units for two targets, but ambiguity remained.

warnings.summary: Extra raw code did not collapse the candidate set to one authority target.

stages.name: result_finalization
stages.summary: Low confidence and blocked guardrails emitted with explicit risk flags.

warnings.summary: One target namespace only exposed structural definitions.
Two payment-related candidates remain close after ranking.

degradations.summary: Fallback parsing was used for the retry namespace.
Soft ranking signals were required to preserve one exploratory unit.

reasons.summary: Relevant lexical overlap exists across multiple files.

warnings.summary: Retrieval relied on fallback parsing for one of the key files.
Multiple candidate units remain plausible edit targets.

missing_evidence.summary: The system could not resolve the target to a single authority definition.
No trustworthy nearby test evidence was found for the retry path.

blocking_reasons.summary: The retrieval result did not localize a single authority target.
Confidence stayed low after fallback parsing and limited graph evidence.

required_next_steps.summary: Request human review before drafting or applying changes.
Expand retrieval only after narrowing the target and validating related tests.

risk_flags.summary: The likely impact surface spans multiple files and unresolved neighbors.
One of the target files was only available through fallback parsing.
